description_long: This is a two-story stone hardware store with a steeply pitched, shingled roof and a prominent wooden-framed storefront. The ground floor features large display windows, one of which is partially covered with weathered wooden boards, while the other showcases a variety of hardware goods. The upper floor has two shuttered windows with wooden frames, and the side of the building displays a vintage-style painted sign advertising 'Bière d'ALSACE.' A metal balcony and staircase are visible on one side, and the rear of the building has a simple wooden door. The structure is characterized by its rustic stonework, aged wood, and utilitarian design, evoking a traditional European village hardware shop.
description: A rustic two-story stone hardware store with wooden-framed display windows, shuttered upper windows, and a vintage painted sign on the side. The storefront features weathered wood and visible hardware goods, with a metal balcony and rear access.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main wooden-framed storefront with large display windows, two upper shuttered windows, and stone facade.
description_view_1: Side view featuring a large painted sign advertising 'Bière d'ALSACE' on the stone wall, with the roof and part of the storefront visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain stone wall, a single wooden door, and a metal balcony with stairs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a wooden door on the upper floor, metal balcony, and a partial view of the storefront display window.
attribute_storefront_signage: No explicit signage is visible on the main storefront; a painted sign reading 'Centenaire Fâcheur Bière d'ALSACE' in red and blue is present on the side wall.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features two large display windows framed in wood, with one window partially boarded and the other displaying goods. The entrance is centrally located, flanked by the display areas, and the upper floor has two shuttered windows.
